name: Noise Monitoring Requirements in Utah

mainEntity.name: Is noise monitoring required before hearing conservation in North Salt Lake?
mainEntity.text: Is noise monitoring required before hearing conservation in North Salt Lake?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, OSHA mandates representative monitoring at 85 dB TWA to identify at-risk employees before program initiation and annual audiometrics.

suggestedAnswer.text: Dosimetry identifies exposures in North Salt Lake plants. Skipping voids defenses; workers demand logs for claims. Legal discovery uncovers non-compliance, boosting settlements.[2]

description: Yes, OSHA mandates representative monitoring at 85 dB TWA to identify at-risk employees before program initiation and annual audiometrics.
